reference: I am two weeks pregnant, and I started spotting on the 3rd of October. It has now become worse to the extent of wearing a pad. The blood is bright red, and I am experiencing mild abdominal cramping on and off. The blood is now saturating three pads a day, and at some point, it is coming out as a clot. I also have some light-headedness for a little bit. What do you think is wrong with me?
